title: MAIP Relationship Schema
description: JSON Schema for MAIP protocol relationship data structures, including relationship types, statuses, permissions, and relationship records.

RelationshipType.title: RelationshipType
RelationshipType.description: The type of relationship between two entities.

RelationshipStatus.title: RelationshipStatus
RelationshipStatus.description: The current status of a relationship.

RelationshipPermissions.title: RelationshipPermissions
RelationshipPermissions.description: Permissions governing what actions are allowed within a relationship.

maxDailyInteractions.description: Optional maximum number of interactions allowed per day.

Relationship.title: Relationship
Relationship.description: A relationship record between two MAIP entities.

participants.description: A tuple of exactly two DIDs representing the participants in this relationship.

initiatedBy.description: The DID of the entity that initiated this relationship.

established.description: The date-time when this relationship was established.

trustLevel.description: The trust level in this relationship, from 0 to 1.

lastInteraction.description: Optional date-time of the last interaction in this relationship.

interactionCount.description: The total number of interactions in this relationship.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about this relationship.
